headline: How FERC’s Transmission Cut and Reaffirmed Guidance Will Impact Eversource Energy (ES) Investors
summary: In late April 2026, analysts at Bank of America and Wells Fargo reiterated positive views on Eversource Energy while flagging regulatory and financial pressures, especially the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission’s cut to New England transmission returns. Eversource Energy simultaneously reaffirmed its 2026 earnings outlook and long-term EPS growth target, underscoring management’s confidence despite these regulatory headwinds and uncertainty around a potential Aquarion sale. We’ll now...
